MOD = 998244353
def comb(n, r):
    nu = 1
    de = 1
    for i in range(r):
        nu = nu * (n - i) % MOD
        de = de * (i + 1) % MOD
    return nu * pow(de, -1, MOD) % MOD


N, K = map(int, input().split())
A = list(map(int, input().split()))

A.sort()
ans = 0
for i in range(K - 1, N):
    ans = (ans + A[i] * comb(i, i - K + 1)) % MOD

print(ans)
